adapt.workspaceFileParentTreeFresh: ${(()=>{const seen={};const src=(Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).filter(raw=>{const k=String((raw&&raw.path)||(raw&&raw.file_id)||'');if(!k||seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;});const map={};src.forEach(raw=>{if(!raw||!raw.file_id){return;}map[String(raw.file_id)]=Object.assign({},raw,{key:raw.file_id,title:raw.name,children:[]});});const roots=[];src.forEach(raw=>{if(!raw||!raw.file_id){return;}const item=map[String(raw.file_id)];const pid=String(raw.parent_id||'');if(pid&&map[pid]){map[pid].children.push(item);}else{roots.push(item);}});const sort=(arr)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)){return [];}arr.sort((a,b)=>String(a.title||a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.title||b.name||'')));arr.forEach(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){sort(n.children);}else{delete n.children;}});return arr;};return sort(roots);})()}

action.description: 打开文件管理表单，设置store变量

action.title: 当前项目缺少同步配置
确认同步
action.content: ${(()=>{const p=workspaceOptions.find(item=>item.project_code===workspaceCurrent)||{};return '确认同步项目【'+(p.project_name||workspaceCurrent||'')+'】目录到工作空间吗？';})()}

adapt.workspaceTreeLazyChildren: ${(()=>{const seen={};return (Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).filter(item=>{const k=String((item&&item.path)||(item&&item.file_id)||'');if(!k||seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;}).map(item=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true), key: item.file_id, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false }));})()}

value.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const setChildren=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.map(n=>{if(!n){return n;}if(n.file_id===node.file_id){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: workspaceTreeLazyChildren||[], __lazy_loaded: true });}if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: setChildren(n.children) });}return n;});};return setChildren(Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[]);})()}

adapt.workspaceFileParentTreeFresh: ${(()=>{const seen={};const src=(Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).filter(raw=>{const k=String((raw&&raw.path)||(raw&&raw.file_id)||'');if(!k||seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;});const map={};src.forEach(raw=>{if(!raw||!raw.file_id){return;}map[String(raw.file_id)]=Object.assign({},raw,{key:raw.file_id,title:raw.name,children:[]});});const roots=[];src.forEach(raw=>{if(!raw||!raw.file_id){return;}const item=map[String(raw.file_id)];const pid=String(raw.parent_id||'');if(pid&&map[pid]){map[pid].children.push(item);}else{roots.push(item);}});const sort=(arr)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)){return [];}arr.sort((a,b)=>String(a.title||a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.title||b.name||'')));arr.forEach(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){sort(n.children);}else{delete n.children;}});return arr;};return sort(roots);})()}

workspaceFileForm.path: ${(()=>{const isDir=(v)=>v==='1'||v===1||v===true||v==='true';const find=(arr,id)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)||!id){return null;}for(const item of arr){if(!item){continue;}if(String(item.file_id||'')===String(id)){return item;}const child=find(item.children,id);if(child){return child;}}return null;};if(node&&isDir(node.is_dir)&&node.path){return node.path;}if(node&&node.parent_id){const parentNode=find(Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[],node.parent_id);if(parentNode&&parentNode.path){return parentNode.path;}}const current=workspaceOptions.find(item=>item.project_code===workspaceCurrent)||{};return current.project_dir||'';})()}

rightMenuAction.title: 确认提示
rightMenuAction.content: ${node.is_dir?'确认删除目录【'+(node.name||node.title)+'】吗？删除后将同时删除该目录下所有子目录和文件。':'确认删除文件【'+(node.name||node.title)+'】吗？'}

adapt.workspaceTreeLazyChildren: ${(()=>{const seen={};return (Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).filter(item=>{const k=String((item&&item.path)||(item&&item.file_id)||'');if(!k||seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;}).map(item=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true), key: item.file_id, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false }));})()}

value.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const norm=(v)=>{let s=String(v||'').replace(/\\/g,'/');while(s.length>1&&s.endsWith('/')){s=s.slice(0,-1);}return s;};const targetId=String(node&&node.parent_id?node.parent_id:'');const targetPath=norm(workspaceTreeKeepExpandPath||'');const projectDir=norm(workspaceTreeKeepProjectDir||'');const children=Array.isArray(workspaceTreeLazyChildren)?workspaceTreeLazyChildren:[];if(!targetId&&(!targetPath||(projectDir&&targetPath===projectDir))){return children;}const setChildren=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.map(n=>{if(!n){return n;}const idMatch=targetId&&String(n.file_id||'')===targetId;const pathMatch=targetPath&&norm(n.path||'')===targetPath;if(idMatch||pathMatch){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: children, __lazy_loaded: true });}if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: setChildren(n.children) });}return n;});};return setChildren(Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[]);})()}

rightMenuAction.method: ${(()=>{const norm=(v)=>{let s=String(v||'').replace(/\\/g,'/');while(s.length>1&&s.endsWith('/')){s=s.slice(0,-1);}return s;};const projectDir=norm(workspaceTreeKeepProjectDir||'');const expandPath=norm(workspaceTreeKeepExpandPath||'');const targetName=String(workspaceTreeKeepTargetName||'').trim();const relative=expandPath&&projectDir&&expandPath.indexOf(projectDir)===0?expandPath.slice(projectDir.length):expandPath;const chain=relative.split('/').filter(Boolean);const getSwitcher=(titleEl,root)=>{let node=titleEl;while(node&&node!==root){if(node.classList&&node.classList.contains('ant-tree-treenode')){const list=node.getElementsByClassName('ant-tree-switcher');return list&&list.length>0?list[0]:null;}node=node.parentElement;}return null;};let tick=0;const tryRestore=()=>{const doc=(typeof window!=='undefined'&&window.document)?window.document:null;if(!doc){return false;}const root=doc.querySelector('.workspace-source-tree');if(!root){return false;}for(const seg of chain){const titles=[...root.querySelectorAll('.ant-tree-title')].filter(el=>String((el.textContent||'')).trim()===seg);for(const titleEl of titles){const switcher=getSwitcher(titleEl,root);if(!switcher||typeof switcher.click!=='function'){continue;}const cls=String(switcher.className||'');if(cls.indexOf('ant-tree-switcher_close')>=0){switcher.click();return false;}}}if(targetName){const target=[...root.querySelectorAll('.ant-tree-title')].find(el=>String((el.textContent||'')).trim()===targetName);if(target&&typeof target.click==='function'){target.click();return true;}}return chain.length===0||tick>6;};const timer=window.setInterval(()=>{tick+=1;const ok=tryRestore();if(ok||tick>=28){window.clearInterval(timer);}},240);window.setTimeout(tryRestore,180);})()}

keyboardAction.title: 只能在同一个项目内粘贴
确认删除
keyboardAction.content: ${(()=>{const count=(Array.isArray(rows)?rows:[]).filter(item=>item&&item.file_id).length;return '确认删除 '+count+' 个文件/目录吗？目录会同时删除其子目录和文件。';})()}

adapt.workspaceTreePasteTargetParentPath: ${(()=>{const remote=(data&&data.remote_result)||{};if(remote.target_parent_path){return remote.target_parent_path;}const norm=(v)=>{let s=String(v||'').replace(/\\/g,'/');while(s.length>1&&s.endsWith('/')){s=s.slice(0,-1);}return s;};const dirname=(p)=>{const raw=norm(p);const seg=raw.split('/').filter(Boolean);if(seg.length<=1){return raw.startsWith('/')?'/':'';}return '/' + seg.slice(0,-1).join('/');};const isDir=(v)=>v==='1'||v===1||v===true||v==='true';const target=node||{};if(target&&target.path&&isDir(target.is_dir)){return norm(target.path);}if(target&&target.path){return dirname(target.path);}return (workspaceOptions.find(item=>item.project_code===workspaceCurrent)||{}).project_dir||'';})()}
adapt.workspaceTreePastedRows: ${(()=>{const copied=((((data||{}).remote_result)||{}).copied)||[];const isDir=(v)=>v==='1'||v===1||v===true||v==='true';return (Array.isArray(copied)?copied:[]).map(item=>{const p=String((item&&item.target_path)||(item&&item.path)||'');const name=String((item&&item.name)||p.split('/').pop()||'');return Object.assign({}, item, { path:p, target_path:p, key:(item&&item.file_id)||p, title:name, name:name, isLeaf: !isDir(item&&item.is_dir), __lazy_loaded:false });});})()}

adapt.workspaceTreeLazyChildren: ${(()=>{const seen={};return (Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).filter(item=>{const k=String((item&&item.path)||(item&&item.file_id)||'');if(!k||seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;}).map(item=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true), key: item.file_id, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false }));})()}

value.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const norm=(v)=>{let s=String(v||'').replace(/\\/g,'/');while(s.length>1&&s.endsWith('/')){s=s.slice(0,-1);}return s;};const targetId=String(workspaceTreePasteTargetParentId||'');const targetPath=norm(workspaceTreePasteTargetParentPath||'');const projectDir=norm(workspaceTreePasteProjectDir||'');const children=Array.isArray(workspaceTreeLazyChildren)?workspaceTreeLazyChildren:[];if(!targetId&&(!targetPath||(projectDir&&targetPath===projectDir))){return children;}const setChildren=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.map(n=>{if(!n){return n;}const idMatch=targetId&&String(n.file_id||'')===targetId;const pathMatch=targetPath&&norm(n.path||'')===targetPath;if(idMatch||pathMatch){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: children, __lazy_loaded: true });}if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: setChildren(n.children) });}return n;});};return setChildren(Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[]);})()}

keyboardAction.method: ${(()=>{const norm=(v)=>{let s=String(v||'').replace(/\\/g,'/');while(s.length>1&&s.endsWith('/')){s=s.slice(0,-1);}return s;};const projectDir=norm(workspaceTreePasteProjectDir||'');const expandPath=norm(workspaceTreePasteTargetParentPath||'');const targetName=String(workspaceTreePasteTargetName||'').trim();const relative=expandPath&&projectDir&&expandPath.indexOf(projectDir)===0?expandPath.slice(projectDir.length):expandPath;const chain=relative.split('/').filter(Boolean);const getSwitcher=(titleEl,root)=>{let node=titleEl;while(node&&node!==root){if(node.classList&&node.classList.contains('ant-tree-treenode')){const list=node.getElementsByClassName('ant-tree-switcher');return list&&list.length>0?list[0]:null;}node=node.parentElement;}return null;};let tick=0;const tryRestore=()=>{const doc=(typeof window!=='undefined'&&window.document)?window.document:null;if(!doc){return false;}const root=doc.querySelector('.workspace-source-tree');if(!root){return false;}for(const seg of chain){const titles=[...root.querySelectorAll('.ant-tree-title')].filter(el=>String((el.textContent||'')).trim()===seg);for(const titleEl of titles){const switcher=getSwitcher(titleEl,root);if(!switcher||typeof switcher.click!=='function'){continue;}const cls=String(switcher.className||'');if(cls.indexOf('ant-tree-switcher_close')>=0){switcher.click();return false;}}}const selected=root.querySelector('.ant-tree-node-selected .ant-tree-title');if(selected&&(!targetName||String((selected.textContent||'')).trim()===targetName)){if(typeof selected.scrollIntoView==='function'){selected.scrollIntoView({block:'nearest'});}if(typeof selected.click==='function'){selected.click();return true;}}if(targetName){const target=[...root.querySelectorAll('.ant-tree-title')].find(el=>String((el.textContent||'')).trim()===targetName);if(target&&typeof target.click==='function'){target.click();return true;}}return chain.length===0||tick>6;};const timer=window.setInterval(()=>{tick+=1;const ok=tryRestore();if(ok||tick>=28){window.clearInterval(timer);}},240);window.setTimeout(tryRestore,180);})()}

value.workspaceTreeSelected: ${Object.assign({}, row, { path: row.file_path, title: row.file_name, is_dir: '0' })}

children.placeholder: 输入关键字(至少2个字符)

children.children: ${(()=>{const s=workspaceContentSearchSummary||{};if(!s||Object.keys(s).length===0){return '';};const matched=Number(s.matched_files||0);const hit=Number(s.hit_count||0);const scanned=Number(s.scanned_files||0);const duration=Number(s.duration_ms||0);const tail=s.truncated?'，结果已截断':'';return '命中文件 '+matched+'，命中 '+hit+'，扫描 '+scanned+'，耗时 '+duration+'ms'+tail;})()}

value.workspaceTreeSelected: ${Object.assign({}, row, { path: row.file_path, title: row.file_name, is_dir: '0' })}

children.children: ${(()=>{const text=String(row.match_text||'');const form=workspaceContentSearchForm||{};const keyword=String(form.keyword||'').trim();if(!keyword){return text;}const matchCase=!!form.match_case;const source=matchCase?text:text.toLowerCase();const key=matchCase?keyword:keyword.toLowerCase();const idx=source.indexOf(key);if(idx<0){return text;}return text.slice(0,idx);})()}
